I just add my keyword references here So I this one has no keywords because it's the one that that's literally targeting all of our audiences at once But like for the ones where I'm targeting how to write ads keywords I just added that to the end of the ad group the reason I do that is for my reporting because I use high roasts It'll just tell me which ad group produced the lead or the sale So if all of the ad groups have the same name it'll make my reporting look weird if you don't use high roasts It doesn't matter But that's a change that I did so now we've got all these guys made I'm gonna make one final one which is I just take all of the keywords and slap them in one Campaign together just to see what happens and the reason why is because you just oh, I don't want to do that I'm gonna say copy There we go.
